name: bottega-dex
description: One Codex-native issue-to-PR workflow with mandatory cross-family review.

interface.shortDescription: Take an issue to a reviewed, evidence-backed PR.
interface.longDescription: Runs discovery, specification, planning, native subagent implementation, mandatory Codex and Claude review, proportional product QA, and pull request delivery from one Codex task.
defaultPrompt: $bottega-dex:run Ship this issue to a pull request.
$bottega-dex:run Fix this bug and prove it is gone.
